name: 03-undeclared-egress-delta
description: Declared contains net:egress to api.example.com; observed contains that entry plus net:egress to api.untrusted.example. Delta (observed − declared) is non-empty: api.untrusted.example is undeclared. This is the silent-capability-creep detector's canonical case.
notes: Per ADR-0005, delta is derived not stored. Consumers compute it by set-difference on (id, qualifiers) over the core namespace. Policy #6 (no-undeclared-egress) would fire deny on this fixture's delta. Observed array ordering: two entries share id=net:egress; tiebreaker is JCS(qualifiers), which sorts api.example.com before api.untrusted.example (e < u in the host value).
